## 🎯 Mission

> *"Every file tells a story. Every log leaves evidence. Every byte matters."*

I'm passionate about creating tools that help in:

- 🔬 Digital Evidence Analysis
- 🛡 Malware Detection
- 📂 File Investigation
- 🤖 AI-powered Forensics
- 🐧 Linux Automation
- 🌐 Modern Web Applications
